text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I enter my office, I spot a piece of paper left
on my desk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "I'll be waiting in the gym! Signed, the class representative!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! I've been waiting for you! I hope
you've braced yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Did I do something wrong? Am I going to get
scolded? Trembling slightly, I prepare myself...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You demonstrated outstanding leadership, and
helped me polish my skills!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Thanks to you, even my Bakushin has
reached new levels!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So allow me to show you the true meaning of
Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I might be an elite among model students,
but you are a trainer among trainers!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This letter embodies my respect for you... It's a
letter of commendation! Please take it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To think I'd receive such a heart-warming letter
from this unpredictable girl... The letter of
commendation brings a tear to my eye.
